item.description:
# N1KO-STATE v1.0.12
**Dashboard and settings UI refresh** — cleaner gauge dashboard alignment, a redesigned settings experience with live previews, and full menu-bar layout controls preserved.
**仪表盘与设置页 UI 焕新** — 仪表盘卡片对齐更整齐，设置页支持实时预览，并完整保留菜单栏布局选项。
---
## Download / 下载
| Asset | Description | |-------|-------------| | **N1KO-STATE.dmg** | Universal binary (Apple Silicon + Intel). Drag to Applications. | | **N1KO-STATE-sparkle.zip** | In-app updater archive used by Sparkle. Normal manual installs should use the DMG. | | **appcast.xml** | Sparkle update feed for automatic update checks. |
**Install note:** If macOS blocks the ad-hoc signed app on first launch, run `xattr -cr /Applications/N1KO-STATE.app` in Terminal. You can also right-click **N1KO-STATE.app** -> **Open** on first launch.
**安装说明：** 如果首次打开被 macOS 拦截，优先在「终端」执行 `xattr -cr /Applications/N1KO-STATE.app`。也可以右键 **N1KO-STATE.app** -> **打开**（仅首次需要）。
---
## What's New / 本版本内容
### Gauge Dashboard Layout / 仪表盘布局优化
- Reworked the gauges popover into a consistent vertical card layout: icon header, centered ring gauge, and aligned detail rows. - Unified the network tile with the same structure as CPU, GPU, memory, disk, and sensors cards. - Moved the quick summary (CPU, memory, download) into compact pills in the popover header. - Increased popover width to 360pt with cleaner spacing and 12pt card corners.
- 仪表盘弹窗改为统一的垂直卡片布局：图标标题、居中环形图、对齐的详情行。 - 网络卡片与其他模块使用相同结构，消除高低不齐。 - 将 CPU / 内存 / 下载摘要移入标题栏 Pill，节省垂直空间。 - 弹窗宽度增至 360pt，间距与圆角更清爽。
### Settings Center Refresh / 设置中心重构
- Redesigned the settings window with grouped sidebar navigation, search, and accent selection states. - Added live popover preview on the Popover tab and an expanded menu-bar preview on the Menu Bar tab. - Preserved all existing menu-bar controls: metric toggles, color mode, layout (Standard / Compact / Stacked / Minimal), font style, and font size. - Window size updated to 980×660 for a less cramped layout.
- 设置窗口采用分组侧边栏、搜索和 accent 选中态。 - 弹窗页新增实时预览；菜单栏页右侧提供更大的实时预览。 - 完整保留菜单栏设置：指标开关、颜色模式、布局（标准 / 紧凑 / 堆叠 / 极简）、字体样式与字号。 - 窗口尺寸调整为 980×660，阅读更舒适。
### Versioning / 版本同步
- Updated app version metadata to `1.0.12` / build `112`. - Updated README version badge and footer.
- 应用版本元数据更新为 `1.0.12` / build `112`。 - README 版本徽章和页脚同步更新。
---
## Regression verified / 回归验证
- `swift build` passed - Localization strings added for settings groups and preview labels - `plutil -lint` on Info.plist recommended before release
---
## Full changelog / 完整变更
**Full changelog:** [v1.0.12 tag](https://github.com/baogutang/N1KO-STATE/releases/tag/v1.0.12)
